Key.English: Mark 'em is a mod that marks the position of flares on the map, making it easier for players to locate them and use them effectively in combat situations.
Controls the refresh rate of the map markers' positions. Increasing this value can help with performance issues. 0 = Per Frame.
Controls the maximum duration for which map markers will be displayed.
Enables the duration hard cap for map markers. This will end the position updates ahead of the grenade's timeToLive.
Enables the display of grid coordinates for map markers.
